name: Patient 39
history: Recurrent stomachaches associated with anxiety and stress. Past difficulties with weight, sexuality, and academics. Reports transformation during college. Seeks control in relationships.
intermediate_belief: My anxiety manifests physically, and I can't control it.
intermediate_belief_depression: My body is betraying me with these physical symptoms of anxiety.
situation: Experiencing ongoing stomach issues and seeking reassurance about recovery.
auto_thought: These stomach problems will never go away. Something must be seriously wrong.
behavior: Experience stomach issues and seek medical reassurance.
